title: ingest_epic_result (brownfield)
description: Retrieve the integration-inventory spec.md + Brownfield Epic Signal Ledger + per-integration confidence + the readiness-gate verdict. The prompt file writes spec.md and epic-signal-ledger.json to the workspace.

spec_md.description: Integration-inventory brownfield spec.md with a Rally provenance header

per_integration_confidence.description: Per-integration fill ratio over the 8 readiness signals (deterministic).

blueprint_gate.description: The 8-signal readiness-gate verdict for the produced spec (H-3 reconciliation).
